failed_attempts:
intro x y h
  ext i
  unfold U8x32_as_Nat at h
  apply Subtype.ext
  induction i using Fin.induction with
  | zero =>
    have := congrArg (· % 256) h
    simp only [Nat.add_mod, Nat.mul_mod_right, Nat.zero_add] at this
    simpa using this
  | succ j ih =>
    have := congrArg (· / 256^(j.val + 1) % 256) h
    simpa using this

intro a b h
  have : a.val = b.val := by
    unfold U8x32_as_Nat at h
    ext i
    · simp [Array.length_val]
    · intro hi _
      have := congrArg (· / 256^i % 256) h
      simp at this ⊢
      omega
  exact Subtype.eq this

unfold Function.Injective
  intro a b h
  unfold U8x32_as_Nat at h
  ext i hi
  simp only [Aeneas.Std.Array.length_val] at hi
  omega

intro x y h
  unfold U8x32_as_Nat at h
  ext i hi
  have hi' : i < 32 := hi
  -- The sum representation is unique because each byte contributes to a disjoint range of bits
  have hx : ∀ j : Fin 32, (x[j.val]).val < 256 := fun j => (x[j.val]).isLt
  have hy : ∀ j : Fin 32, (y[j.val]).val < 256 := fun j => (y[j.val]).isLt
  -- Use digit uniqueness in base 256
  have := Nat.eq_of_digits_eq 256 (by omega) 
    (List.ofFn (fun i : Fin 32 => (x[i.val]).val))
    (List.ofFn (fun i : Fin 32 => (y[i.val]).val))
    (by simp [List.all_ofFn]; intro j; exact Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le (hx j) (by omega))
    (by simp [List.all_ofFn]; intro j; exact Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le (hy j) (by omega))
    (by simp [Nat.ofDigits, List.ofFn]; convert h using 1 <;> ring_nf)
  simp only [List.ofFn_inj] at this
  have := congrFun this ⟨i, hi'⟩
  simp at this
  exact U8.ext this

  ext i hi
  unfold U8x32_as_Nat at h
  omega

intro a b hab
  unfold U8x32_as_Nat at hab
  have h : a.val.val = b.val.val := by
    apply Fin.ext_iff.mpr
    simp only [Fin.val_fin_lt] at hab ⊢
    exact hab
  exact Subtype.ext (Subtype.ext h)

intro x y h
  unfold U8x32_as_Nat at h
  ext i
  have : x[i].val = y[i].val := by
    have hi := i.isLt
    interval_cases i.val <;> omega
  exact Subtype.ext this

intro a b hab
  unfold U8x32_as_Nat at hab
  ext i
  · exact Eq.trans a.property b.property.symm
  · intro hi
    have ha := a.property
    simp only [Array.length_val] at ha hi
    have key : ∀ (j : Fin 32), a.val[j.val]'(by omega) = b.val[j.val]'(by omega) := by
      intro ⟨j, hj⟩
      induction j using Nat.strong_induction_on with
      | _ j ih => 
        simp_all only [Fin.getElem_fin]
        omega
    exact key ⟨i, hi⟩

intro x y h
  ext i hi
  unfold U8x32_as_Nat at h
  simp only [Fin.getElem_fin] at h ⊢
  omega

intro x y h
  ext i
  have := congrArg (fun n => (n / 2^(8*i.val)) % 2^8) h
  simp only [U8x32_as_Nat] at this
  exact Subtype.ext (by omega)

intro x y h
  have : x.val = y.val := by
    apply List.ext_getElem (x.property.trans y.property.symm)
    intro i hi _
    have hi32 : i < 32 := by simp only [Array.length_val] at hi; exact x.property ▸ hi
    unfold U8x32_as_Nat at h
    have hxlen : x.val.length = 32 := x.property
    have hylen : y.val.length = 32 := y.property
    apply Subtype.ext
    have : ∀ k < 32, (x.val[k]).val = (y.val[k]).val := fun k hk => by
      have := Nat.digits_injective (b := 256) (by norm_num)
      sorry
    exact this i hi32
  exact Subtype.ext this

intro x y h
  have : x = y := by
    ext i hi
    unfold U8x32_as_Nat at h
    sorry
  exact this

intro x y hxy
  ext i hi
  unfold U8x32_as_Nat at hxy
  have key : ∀ j < 32, x[j].val = y[j].val := fun j hj => by
    have := Nat.digits_injective (by norm_num : 1 < 256)
    sorry
  exact U8.ext _ _ (key i hi)

unfold Function.Injective U8x32_as_Nat
  intro x y h
  funext i
  have hi := i.isLt
  ext
  have extract := fun (a : Fin 32 → U8) (j : Fin 32) => 
    (∑ k : Fin 32, a k |>.val * 256 ^ k.val) / 256 ^ j.val % 256 = a j |>.val
  have hx := extract x i
  have hy := extract y i
  sorry

  unfold U8x32_as_Nat at h
  simp only at h
  ext i hi : 1
  have := congrArg (· / 256^i.val % 256) h
  simp at this
  exact Subtype.ext (UInt8.val_injective this)

intro x y hxy
  funext i
  unfold U8x32_as_Nat at hxy
  have h256 : (256 : ℕ) > 1 := by norm_num
  induction i using Fin.inductionOn generalizing x y with
  | zero => 
    have : x[0].val = y[0].val := by
      have := congrArg (· % 256) hxy
      simp at this
      have hx : x[0].val < 256 := x[0].isLt  
      have hy : y[0].val < 256 := y[0].isLt
      omega
    exact Subtype.ext this
  | succ j ih => sorry
